name: 气候与环境
subject: humanities
curriculum_points: Explain the natural and enhanced greenhouse effect, analyzing the interrelationships between climate systems, biomes, and human societies (AO1, AO2).
Evaluate different responses (mitigation and adaptation) to climate change and environmental degradation, considering their feasibility and ethical dimensions (AO3).
